news.title: How A Major Dollar Rise In Crude Oil Travels Through India’s Energy Chain
news.india_relevance: It explains the specific transmission mechanism of global oil price shocks into the Indian domestic economy.
news.why_it_matters: Understanding the cost-push inflation path from global crude to local fuel helps investors predict margin pressures across sectors.

news.title: US Section 301 probe may impose new tariffs on India, China, EU
news.india_relevance: The probe targets Indian trade practices and could lead to significant retaliatory tariffs on Indian exports.
news.why_it_matters: A revival of Trump-era trade investigations threatens India's export-led growth and necessitates a diplomatic or trade response.

news.title: FDI policy eased: Relaxed PN3 opens door for global funds with Chinese stakes
news.india_relevance: This is a major shift in India's stance on capital coming from countries sharing land borders, specifically targeting tech and electronics.
news.why_it_matters: Relaxing Press Note 3 could unlock billions in stalled capital for Indian startups and manufacturing units with indirect Chinese links.

news.title: Reliance remains mum even as Trump announces ‘historic’ $300 billion U.S. refinery deal

news.title: India’s luxury split: Hermès grows as Gucci, Dior lose momentum
